text:
Skin Care Hot Springs (美肌温泉) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. It brings forth a relaxing hot spring.

|align=center colspan="3"|A hot spring that cures you of any skin condition. Bathing in it for half an hour a day gives you skin as soft and smooth as a baby's.

Summary

Skin Care Hot Springs (美肌温泉): When used by a player, this spring is capable of curing any skin condition you may be suffering from. You can wash yourself and relax in this hot spring for as long as you wish. Bathing in it for half an hour a day will make your skin as soft and smooth as a baby's.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.004 - 美肌温泉 
美肌に関する悩みを全て解決してくれる温泉。１日30分の入浴で赤ちゃんの様なスベスベの肌になる。
|-
![Eng]
|No.004 - Skin Care Hot Springs 
A hot spring that solves the worries about beautiful skin. Take a bath 30 minutes a day to have skin as smooth like a baby.
|}
